goal: Design production high-risk approval integration boundary for the one-target pilot while keeping all production gates false.

highRiskApprovalBoundary.normalRows: not high-risk and can be first-pilot eligible only if the target is otherwise normal scalar
highRiskApprovalBoundary.highRiskRows: approval required, production approval unavailable, excluded from first pilot

highRiskClassificationIntegration.firstPilotBehavior: any high-risk row is excluded from the first production write pilot
highRiskClassificationIntegration.hardBlockInteraction: high-risk approval cannot override missing line, structured target, unreadable target, script/Lua required target, or unresolved duplicate ambiguity

copy: Some settings need extra review before they can ever be written.
High-risk rows are excluded from the first production write pilot.
High-risk approval is not active yet.
Real writing is not active yet.
futureAcknowledgementText: I understand this setting may affect session stability.
I understand this setting may require manual recovery if misconfigured.
I understand the app must back up, write, reread, verify, and recover safely.
I understand high-risk approval does not override hard blocks.

firstPilotHighRiskExclusion.normalNonHighRiskScalarTarget: can be eligible but production gate remains false

blockedReasons: This setting needs separate high-risk approval.
High-risk approval is not active yet.
High-risk approval cannot override this block.
This target is not eligible for the first write pilot.

copy: Some settings need extra review before they can ever be written.
High-risk rows are excluded from the first production write pilot.
High-risk approval is not active yet.
Real writing is not active yet.

uiChanges: Added disabled high-risk approval copy to the existing production review section.
No active approval controls, checkboxes, or handlers were added.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts left uncommitted

proofUsed: Boundary tests proving normal rows do not require high-risk approval and high-risk rows require unavailable production approval.
Classification tests covering not-high-risk, approvable-later, separate-policy, hard-blocked, and unknown categories.
Approval state tests proving every state is non-persistent, non-applying, and cannot make a first-pilot target eligible.
First-pilot exclusion tests proving high-risk and hard-blocked targets remain excluded.
Recommendation tests proving high-risk blocked reasons and inactive approval copy.
Source-level Apply/write isolation tests proving write_flow.rs does not import or call the high-risk approval boundary.
proofStillMissing: No production high-risk approval UI is active.
No production write-target selection is active.
No production backup/write/reread/recovery flow is active.
nextRecommendedSprint: Design production one-target pilot manual smoke checklist and final pre-enable audit while keeping all production gates false.
